operations.comment: The previous version of CONUS excluded the 50th percentile, so this will as well. Data from in (25th, 75th] is the IQR, which is considered 'fairly normal'. This variable is for identifying 'weird' values, so the IQR is set at a value of '0.0'
Add upstreamflow to each input file by calling 'post_processing.transform.calculate_upstream_flow.calculate_upstream_flow' on each

on_each.comment: This should end up calling `calculate_upstream_flow(input_path=data, output_path=data, routelink_path='{application_path}/RouteLink_CONUS.nc')`

operations.message: An output for 'nwm.t<date><cycle>z.analysis_assim.channel_rt.tm00.conus.nc' should be generated, as defined in {source_file}. This should just have time, reference_time, feature_id, crs, feature_id, streamflow, and streamflow_anomaly

An output for 'nwm.t<date><cycle>z.analysis_assim.channel_rt.tm00.abrfc.nc' should be generated, as defined in {source_file}. This should just have station, station_id, time, reference_time, streamflow, and upstreamflow
